summary: The diff implements all four requirements: REQ-28 (backend admin stable storage via claimAdmin in backend/main.mo), REQ-29 (useIsCallerAdmin and useClaimAdmin hooks in useQueries.ts), REQ-30 (conditional Admin Panel link in Navbar.tsx for both desktop and mobile), and REQ-31 (access guard in Admin.tsx with redirect and Access Denied message). The implementation is largely complete with a concern about admin persistence across canister upgrades due to the migration module resetting adminPrincipal to null.

missing_requirements.requirement: The admin principal must persist across canister upgrades.
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo file initializes adminPrincipal to null rather than preserving an existing value. The migration run() function ignores the old actor state and always returns null for adminPrincipal, meaning any previously set admin principal would be lost on canister upgrade.

hallucinated_features.description: useClaimAdmin mutation hook that is automatically called on every login attempt in Navbar.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest describes admin designation as occurring on first backend call or via a designated claimAdmin function, but does not specify automatic silent invocation on every login for all users including non-admins. This is an implementation detail not explicitly requested.
